title: queue
waiting_notice: There are currently {{ count }} videos in queue. Please wait for download.
success_notice: Successfully downloaded {{ count }} videos in this batch.
manual_save_warning: Important: After videos finish downloading, click "Save" immediately. Downloads in queue may be lost after browser restart.
